Call ID: EXT-022
Type: external
Date: 2026-06-02
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Hannah (account manager); Naomi (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Hannah): Hi Naomi, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Naomi): My team keeps asking for a better mobile experience.
AM (Hannah): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Naomi): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Hannah): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Naomi): This was helpful. Let's keep the momentum going.
AM (Hannah): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
